zh: 项目诞生 — 一个空 index.html, 没工具、没数据、没后端
en: Project born — one empty index.html, no tools, no data, no backend

zh: WCA Statistics 数据管道上线 (Ruby + Jekyll + 周更 CI)
en: WCA Statistics pipeline launched (Ruby + Jekyll + weekly CI)

zh: i18n 框架雏形 + Solver/Trainers/Stats 三栏中英化 + 第一版 Landing
en: i18n framework; Solver/Trainers/Stats bilingual; first landing page

zh: WR Dominance 统计 + XXCross Trainer 集成 + upstream 同步脚本 + stats OOM 修复
en: WR Dominance stat; XXCross Trainer imported; upstream-sync script; stats OOM fixes

zh: WR stats 大重构 (13 stats → 1 Metric 页, 4 → 1 AoXR) + URL hash 状态 + 国旗
en: WR-stats refactor (13→1 metric page, 4→1 AoXR); URL hash state; country flags

zh: WR Newcomer 双源 (Single/Avg) + Dominance 项目选择 + wr_newcomer SQL 10x 提速
en: WR Newcomer dual-source; Dominance event picker; 10x speedup on wr_newcomer SQL

zh: 玻璃态卡片 + 魔方粒子动画 + parallel-gem 并行构建 + Rolling Average 重命名
en: Glassmorphism cards; Rubik's-particle animation; parallel-gem CI; Rolling Average rename

zh: Stats UI 整体改 dropdown + segmented control + DRY 提取
en: Stats UI overhaul — dropdowns + segmented controls + DRY extraction

zh: Stats UI 从 Ruby 静态生成切到 JS-driven (data-label-* + stats_ui.js)
en: Stats UI moves from Ruby static-gen to JS-driven (data-label-* + stats_ui.js)

zh: 333mbf Mo3 统计 (mbf_average 页) + LF 行尾归一化
en: 333mbf Mo3 page; LF line endings normalized

zh: Upcoming Comps 追踪器上线 (顶级选手 + WR badge + 24h 缓存)
en: Upcoming Comps tracker launched (top cubers + WR badges + 24h cache)

zh: 中国大陆比赛接 cubing.com + 现/前 WR 分色 + Recon Phase 1 MVP + WCA OAuth + Firestore
en: China mainland comps via cubing.com; current/former WR colored; Recon Phase 1 MVP; WCA OAuth + Firestore

zh: Recon 增强 — TwistyPlayer + alg.cubing.net 链接 + STM/TPS + 比赛 dropdown + 选手主页
en: Recon polish — TwistyPlayer + alg.cubing.net links + STM/TPS + comp dropdown + user profile

zh: Recon 加 Single 列 + 无限滚动 + MM:SS 时间格式
en: Recon: Single col + infinite scroll + MM:SS time format

zh: Recon Phase 2 — cancelled 标记 + admin 编辑 modal + /recon/submit 独立页 + Firestore → PHP+MariaDB
en: Recon Phase 2 — cancelled badges + admin edit modal + /recon/submit page + Firestore → PHP+MariaDB

zh: Recon 数据 JSON → MariaDB + 写入鉴权 + 选手自动补全 (WCA API proxy) + /recon/ID 路由
en: Recon data JSON → MariaDB; write auth; solver autocomplete via WCA proxy; /recon/ID detail route

zh: 记录徽章 / 列宽 / 移动端阻 zoom 等小样式修
en: Record-badge / column-width / mobile zoom-block small style fixes

zh: WCA 账号切换 + /me API 缓存 + addedBy 字段追踪 recon 提交者
en: WCA account switch; /me API cache; addedBy field tracks submitter

zh: addedBy 回填脚本 + 提交者可改自己的 recon + cleanForPlayer 修宽块匹配
en: addedBy backfill; recon authors can edit own entries; cleanForPlayer wide-move match fix

zh: 加 cube/reconer/group_id schema + favicon + 比赛国家落库
en: Add cube/reconer/group_id schema fields; favicon; comp country auto-saved

zh: solution 列 + ReconStats 引擎重算 + BLD exec/memo time 字段 + raw_time 重命名
en: solution col; ReconStats engine recomputes; BLD exec/memo time fields; raw_time rename

zh: 本地优先 person 搜索 (Slack-style) + 自动 Single = Time + 比赛搜索接 cubing.com
en: Local-first person search (Slack-style); auto Single = Time; comp search uses cubing.com data

zh: Recon 光标跟随 TwistyPlayer + 视频嵌入 (YouTube/Bilibili 门面) + Alg-Trainers fork + HTH Calc 上线
en: Cursor-following TwistyPlayer; YouTube/Bilibili facade embeds; Alg-Trainers fork; HTH Calc launches

zh: HTH Calc iOS-style 数字键盘 + 跨格删除 + PWA 品牌化
en: HTH Calc iOS-style numpad + cross-cell delete + PWA branding

zh: HTH Calc Canvas → DOM+SVG 全栈重构 (6 Phases) + 成绩分布 KDE 图 + 改名 /calc + Rand 用 KDE
en: HTH Calc Canvas → DOM+SVG full rewrite (6 phases); KDE distribution chart; renamed /calc; Rand via KDE

zh: 魔方记号虚拟键盘 (QWERTY + 长按变体 + 触发器栏) + 1v1 Battle 上线 + csTimer 集成 (self-hosted)
en: Cube-notation virtual keyboard (QWERTY + long-press + trigger bar); 1v1 Battle launches; csTimer integrated (self-hosted)

zh: Battle 大量增强 — 五彩纸屑 + Solo 模式 + 自定义背景 + Ao5 统计 + Batch 1-3
en: Battle major polish — confetti + Solo mode + custom backgrounds + Ao5 stats + Batch 1-3

zh: 全站 WCA 登录 (顶角头像) + Battle 云同步成绩 + Calc 鼓轮 picker
en: Site-wide WCA login (top-corner avatar); Battle cloud-sync; Calc drum picker

zh: Calc 阈值徽章 + WR 五彩纸屑 + Battle Phase A/B/C 重构 + 改进度 slider
en: Calc threshold badges + WR confetti; Battle Phase A/B/C refactor; improvement slider

zh: Calc 柱形拖拽反推第 5 把 + 数字鼓轮 + 长按加速
en: Calc bar-drag reverse-calc 5th solve; numpad drum; long-press acceleration

zh: Calc 1000 轮蒙特卡洛中位数 + 帮助 modal + 个人 Ao100 模拟 (WCA 头像选择)
en: Calc 1000-round Monte Carlo median; help modal; personal Ao100 simulation via WCA avatar picker

zh: /viz 成绩分布页上线 (KDE / 直方图 / 山脊图 / 折线 + 多选手对比 + zoom/pan)
en: /viz distribution page launched (KDE / histogram / ridgeline / line; multi-player; zoom/pan)

zh: Viz 累积直方图 + tooltip 卡片化 + 折线 zoom/pan + wr.json 改 WCA API + Non-PR WR 统计
en: Viz cumulative histogram + card tooltip + line-chart zoom/pan; wr.json swap for WCA API; Non-PR WR stat

zh: React + TS monorepo 上线! 12 工具页迁过来 + cubing.js TwistyPlayer + Fastify backend + ZBLL/ZBLS Trainer
en: React+TS monorepo lands! 12 tools migrated + cubing.js TwistyPlayer + Fastify backend + ZBLL/ZBLS trainers

zh: Fastify → Hono 整体切换 (24h 内换栈) + Calc PA 柱拖拽 + /viz React 化 + Battle 子任务 1-6 React 化
en: Fastify → Hono full backend swap (within 24h); Calc PA-bar drag; /viz React rewrite; Battle subtasks 1-6 React port

zh: Recon React 化 (列表/详情/提交三页) + stats-build TS 重写 (Ruby 完全废)
en: Recon React port (list/detail/submit); stats-build rewritten in TS (Ruby removed)

zh: average_of 详情图表 + wr_dominance 内存 -55% + AoX History Dedup toggle
en: average_of detail charts; wr_dominance -55% memory; AoX History Dedup toggle

zh: 国旗加进 Person/Comp 链接 + cubing-icons 本地化 (CDN → public/vendor)
en: Country flags added to Person/Comp links; cubing-icons localized (CDN → public/vendor)

zh: 删了一个不需要的 stat (表格行数统计) + 小修
en: Dropped an unneeded stat (table row count metric); minor fixes

en: /pretext-demo Pretext Canvas table demo; wr_aoxr date sorting fix

zh: 整站结构大改 — trainer/ → core/、legacy/ 静态目录化 + JWT 路径 + Jekyll 收尾 + 子页面 404 修
en: Big restructure — trainer/ → core/, legacy/ dir, JWT paths, Jekyll cleanup, sub-route 404 fix

zh: Battle 横向布局 + 1v1 实时对手时间 + 拆 /legacy/recon + 移除 Jekyll 依赖
en: Battle landscape layout + opponent live time; decommission /legacy/recon; remove Jekyll deps

zh: 彻底删 Jekyll 构建 + Landing 加 Blog 卡
en: Jekyll build fully removed; landing adds Blog card entry

zh: Ruby stats-build 代码删完 + legacy/ → tools/ + 数据迁完
en: Ruby stats-build code fully removed; legacy/ → tools/; data migration done

en: /frame-count starts (WebCodecs + mp4box.js scaffolding)

zh: Frame Count 帧丢失诊断 + 主页跳转
en: Frame Count missing-frame diagnosis; landing redirects

zh: Gemini 协作修帧丢失
en: Gemini-assisted fix for frame loss

en: Frame Count A-key backstep dedup; ongoing polish

en: Frame Count UI iteration; .claude/settings.local.json gitignored

en: Frame Count further iterations

en: More Frame Count + deploy chain

en: Frame Count + past_comps data lands

zh: Frame Count 持续迭代
en: Frame Count ongoing iteration

en: Wrap-up tweaks

zh: 收尾 / 小修
en: Wrap-up tweaks

en: /alg library Phase 1-5 (docx → SPA data + landing page + Algorithms card)

en: Nemesizer launches (port from speedsolving wiki); /wca-stats/persons lookup; /wb rankings; flags-before-name sweep

en: scramble-stats CSV → JSON pipeline; /timer TS rewrite (Rounds 1A-1E: Kociemba / 2D preview / histogram / cstimer I/O / full events)

zh: /timer 史诗一天 (116 commits)! BLD/分阶段 timing + 智能立方蓝牙 + 3D 预览 + WCA inspection + share URL + 全套移动适配 + CFOP 多阶段 + cstimer 算法引擎 port + 5 个蓝牙协议
en: /timer epic day (116 commits)! BLD/stage timing + smartcube BT + 3D preview + WCA inspection + share URL + mobile polish + CFOP multi-stage + cstimer gSolver port + 5 BLE protocols

en: Top-10 history video export; recon enhancements; ListSelect generic component; comp data updates

en: Recon SameRound autofill (WCA + cubing.com fetch + column filters); Battle per-player event picker; AltSubmit sketch page

en: /calendar list view + range filter + per-event round chips; WCIF baked into upcoming JSON

en: /algdb launches (scrape from speedcubedb); cubedb.net-style autofill in recon submit; cubing.js cube3 wrapper + stage detector

zh: VisualCube 服务化 (esbuild + Node 渲染 + /v1/visualcube.svg + service worker) + /analyze CFOP 分析器 port + ZBLS 库 + Sq1/Megaminx/Pyraminx/Skewb 接 sr-puzzlegen
en: VisualCube as a service (esbuild + Node + /v1/visualcube.svg + SW); /analyze CFOP analyzer port; ZBLS algs; Sq1/Megaminx/Pyraminx/Skewb via sr-puzzlegen

en: Great Refactor day! MariaDB → PostgreSQL 13; 41 alg JSONs → DB; baota/PHP/WP wiped; ZBLS docx scrape; nginx vhost in git

en: Alg admin drag-reorder + X-Admin-Key channel; /calendar compact flag mode; API routes under api.cuberoot.me
